scene_1.visual_plan: Start with a medium shot of the model looking directly at the camera with smooth handheld motion to maintain an intimate, conversational atmosphere and shallow depth of field focusing on the model’s face. After the first sentence, cut to a close-up of the product in the model’s right hand, held near the face with clear branding visible, using a steady tripod shot. Return to the medium shot for the continuation of the dialogue with the model maintaining eye contact. Midway through, cut to a secondary angle showing the model gently holding the serum bottle, emphasizing texture and detail of the product. End with the model holding the product visible near the face in her right hand while softly zooming out as she finishes speaking, keeping a natural pace and genuine expression.
scene_1.dialogue: I regret not doing this sooner in lash care because I used to struggle with weak. sensitive lashes that barely grew despite trying everything. Then I found ETERNAL EYELASH Premium. and honestly. it felt different from the start. my lashes became visibly fuller and more resilient without any irritation—even with my lash extensions. If you want better lashes that actually last. this is a game changer.
